description: You are the Director of Analytics for the Tri-City ValleyCats baseball team. Using the mid-season player statistics and coaching notes in /home/ga/Documents/team_stats_2024.json, create a professional mid-season performance report in Apache OpenOffice Writer saved to /home/ga/Documents/ValleyCats_MidSeason_2024.odt. The report must include a title page, an auto-generated table of contents, page numbers in the footer, and a structured layout using 'Heading 1' for main sections (e.g., Executive Summary, Offense, Pitching) and 'Heading 2' for subsections. The document must contain a Batting Statistics table (including Player Name, AVG, HR, and RBI) and a Pitching Statistics table (including Pitcher Name, ERA, W-L, and Saves) for all players listed in the JSON, supplemented by analytical commentary referencing specific players such as Espinoza or Pittman and their statistics.
